text: People Caring for People | Ramsay Health Care Australia's leader in private hospital and health care World-class care since 1964, built on innovation, excellence and putting people first. We’re more than a private hospital network. We’re a community of people who care deeply for our patients and for each other. This is The Ramsay Way — always putting people first.

From routine check-ups to complex care, find the Ramsay location that meets your needs. Inpatient and outpatient care for mental health and wellbeing. Care to support your recovery, mobility and wellbeing. Flexible care options — at home, online, wherever you need us. We are Australia's largest private hospital network, delivering care where it’s needed most.
